creator: destination_wellknown
caption: Dear Internet, I need your help👇  I think Denmark is a great place to live… in June, July and August. The rest of the year, it’s terribly cold, grey, and rainy 🌧️  I’m kind of joking here, but to be honest, there are times, mainly during the winter months when I’m tempted to move away from the long, dark days in Scandinavia 🥲  Where do you think is the ideal place to live in Europe? 🤓  #denmark #travellife #europe #copenhagen

transcription.text: I get knocked down, but I get up again, cause heaven only beats me down
